user.description: Enter your MitID username to begin authentication.

data_description.mitid_username: The username you use to log in with MitID.

mitid_auth.title: MitID Authentication
mitid_auth.description: Open the MitID app and approve the login request.

mitid_qr.title: Scan QR Code
mitid_qr.description:
Open your MitID app and scan the animated QR code below. Approve the login on your phone, then click **Submit**.

![MitID QR Code]({qr_url})

select_widgets.title: Select Data Providers
select_widgets.description: Select which widget data providers to pull data from.

data_description.widgets: Aula widgets that provide additional data such as library loans, weekplans, and homework.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with MitID
reauth_confirm.description: Your Aula session has expired. Click **Submit** to start re-authentication with MitID for **{mitid_username}**.

reconfigure.description: Token refresh failed. Enter your MitID username to re-authenticate.

data_description.mitid_username: The username you use to log in with MitID.

progress.authenticating: Open the MitID app and approve the login request.

error.auth_failed: MitID authentication failed. Please try again.
error.connection: Unable to connect to Aula. Please check your network.

abort.already_configured: This MitID account is already configured.

auth_failed.message: Authentication with Aula failed. Please re-authenticate.

connection_failed.message: Unable to connect to Aula. Please try again later.
